task: Browse the class schedule of graduate-level chemistry courses on Monday afternoons in the winter of 2023.
final_result_response:
I have successfully browsed the class schedule on Stanford's ExploreCourses website. Here is a summary of the graduate-level chemistry courses offered on Monday afternoons during Winter 2023 (2022-2023 academic year):

**4 courses found:**

1. **CHEM 223: Advanced Organic Chemistry II** — 3 units, LEC, Mon/Wed/Fri 12:30 PM – 1:20 PM at STLC 105, Instructor: Xia, Y. (PI), 9 students enrolled

2. **CHEM 273: Advanced Physical Chemistry** — 3 units, LEC, Mon/Wed/Fri 12:30 PM – 1:20 PM at STLC115, Instructor: Rotskoff, G. (PI), 10 students enrolled

3. **CHEM 299: Teaching of Chemistry** — 1-3 units, Winter LEC: Mon/Wed 7:30 PM – 8:50 PM; DIS: Mon/Wed/Fri 11:30 AM – 12:20 PM, Instructor: Schwartz Poehlmann, J. (PI)

4. **CHEM 300: Department Colloquium** — 1 unit, COL, Mon 3:00 PM – 4:20 PM at STLC 111, Instructor: Markland, T. (PI), 138/225 students enrolled. Note: For all pre-TGR Ph.D. candidates in chemistry.

All courses ran from 01/09/2023 to 03/17/2023 during Winter Quarter 2022-2023.
